name: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR tool
description: For HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR processing 5–15 new hires/month, inefficient manual onboarding causes delays in employee integration. We automate new hire paperwork instead of manual paperwork processing and verification.
target_audience: HR coordinators in small to medium-sized companies using BambooHR
